rationale: Builds on the current best late projection EMA path while pivoting away from more projection-EMA selection heuristics. Projection matrices already look like the quantization-sensitive slice, so this keeps their int8 payload unchanged but stores per-row scales and offsets in fp32 for the exact final roundtrip, spending only a small amount of the remaining size budget on lower dequantization error with no hot-loop cost.
title: Projection EMA With FP32 Metadata
